The '''Dashta Mountains''' were a mountain range on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]], 180 kilometers west of the [[Zantay Hills]] and 75 kilometers northwest of [[Clandes]].

They were named after [[Kilaphor Dashta]], the first person to map them around 422 BBY.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
